subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou didst write to Mírzá Ḥaydar-'Alí hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی انچه بجناب میرزا حیدرعلی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
